race_meta.race_name: Always Gamble Responsibly At BetMGM Handicap

ruby.title: Probability Analysis
ruby.insight: Actual winner champion again ole (ire) was not in model's ranked horses. Model focused too heavily on pre-race favorites. Top prediction was Champion Again Ole with 32.0% confidence.

keenan.title: Forecast & Distribution
keenan.insight: Top forecast prediction was Champion Again Ole > Monsieur Kodi, but actual result was Champion Again Ole (IRE) > Pressure's On (FR). Distribution model underestimated variance in placing combinations.

mordin.title: Market Alignment
mordin.insight: Actual winner not found in market analysis. Market dynamics shifted unexpectedly from pre-race state.
